comment: System-level content patterns for ContentAwarePolicyChecker. Personal patterns live in ~/.memory/config/policy_patterns.json — entries with the same 'name' override system entries.

patterns.name: openai_api_key
patterns.description: OpenAI-style API key detected in tool args

patterns.name: anthropic_api_key
patterns.description: Anthropic API key detected in tool args

patterns.name: aws_access_key
patterns.description: AWS access key ID detected in tool args

patterns.name: aws_secret_key
patterns.description: Possible AWS secret key (40-char base64) in tool args — must be exactly 40 chars, not part of a longer path or token

patterns.name: generic_bearer_token
patterns.description: Bearer token detected in tool args

patterns.name: private_key_block
patterns.description: Private key material detected in tool args

patterns.name: password_cli_flag
patterns.description: Password passed as CLI flag in tool args
